name: B-b-q Meatballs and Smokies (Great)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hamburger and the next 12 ingredients in a bowl. Shape into small meatballs.
2. Saute the meatballs until they are cooked through. Set aside.
3. In a separate pan, combine the Sauce ingredients.
4. Cook the sauce mixture until it thickens.
5. Add the cooked meatballs and Smokies to the sauce.
6. Serve hot and enjoy!
